text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho comes to a close with us
failing to get any closer to her friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Manhattan Cafe takes an interest in
Special Week's ability to run at full tilt after
consuming large portions of food.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As for our next challenge, it only makes sense
that we should aim for the spring Grand Prix—the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, enticed by her friend's invitation,
Manhattan Cafe tells me that she wants to
participate in a big race overseas. Considering
the condition of her toenails though, that'd be far
too dangerous.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But we did promise to chase her friend... Keeping
the Takarazuka Kinen as an option, I decide to
wait and make the final decision about France
next month.
